title: blemeesd.sessions
description: Reply to blemeesd.list_sessions. `sessions` is sorted newest-first by `last_active_at_ms` (preferred) or `mtime_ms` (fallback). The `cwd` field is echoed only when the request supplied one.

cwd.description: Echoed from the request when present; omitted on whole-daemon (live-only) queries.
